title: Artificial Intelligence
content: Artificial Intelligence (AI) enables machines to simulate human intelligence such as learning and reasoning.

title: Machine Learning
content: Machine Learning is a subset of AI that allows systems to learn patterns from data without explicit programming.

title: Deep Learning
content: Deep Learning uses neural networks with multiple layers to model complex patterns in data.

title: Natural Language Processing
content: NLP enables machines to understand and generate human language.

title: Vector Database
content: A vector database stores embeddings and enables similarity search using distance metrics.

title: Qdrant Overview
content: Qdrant is a vector database optimized for fast similarity search and filtering.

title: Embeddings
content: Embeddings are numerical representations of text, images, or data in vector space.

title: Cosine Similarity
content: Cosine similarity measures the angle between two vectors to determine similarity.

title: Euclidean Distance
content: Euclidean distance measures the straight-line distance between two vectors.

title: RAG Concept
content: RAG combines retrieval and generation to improve AI responses with external knowledge.

title: LLM
content: Large Language Models are trained on massive datasets to generate human-like text.

title: Tokenization
content: Tokenization splits text into smaller units for processing by models.

title: Prompt Engineering
content: Prompt engineering is designing inputs to get better outputs from LLMs.

title: Fine-tuning
content: Fine-tuning adapts a pretrained model to a specific task using additional data.

title: Zero-shot Learning
content: Zero-shot learning allows models to perform tasks without prior examples.

title: Few-shot Learning
content: Few-shot learning uses a small number of examples to guide the model.

title: Semantic Search
content: Semantic search finds results based on meaning rather than keywords.

title: Indexing
content: Indexing organizes data for faster retrieval in databases.

title: Metadata Filtering
content: Metadata filtering allows narrowing search results based on attributes.

title: Chunking
content: Chunking splits documents into smaller parts for better embedding and retrieval.

title: Transformer Model
content: Transformers use attention mechanisms to process sequential data efficiently.

title: Attention Mechanism
content: Attention helps models focus on important parts of input data.

title: BERT
content: BERT is a transformer model designed for understanding text context.

title: GPT
content: GPT models generate text using autoregressive language modeling.

title: Overfitting
content: Overfitting occurs when a model learns noise instead of patterns.

title: Underfitting
content: Underfitting occurs when a model fails to capture underlying patterns.

title: Training Data
content: Training data is used to teach machine learning models.

title: Validation Data
content: Validation data evaluates model performance during training.

title: Test Data
content: Test data assesses final model performance.

title: Inference
content: Inference is the process of making predictions using a trained model.

title: API
content: An API allows communication between software systems.

title: REST API
content: REST APIs use HTTP methods for communication.

title: Latency
content: Latency is the delay in response time for a system.

title: Throughput
content: Throughput measures how many requests a system can handle.

title: Scalability
content: Scalability is the ability of a system to handle growth.

title: Distributed Systems
content: Distributed systems consist of multiple interconnected components.

title: Cloud Computing
content: Cloud computing provides on-demand computing resources.

title: Docker
content: Docker is used to containerize applications.

title: Kubernetes
content: Kubernetes manages containerized applications at scale.

title: CI/CD
content: CI/CD automates software testing and deployment.

title: Search Ranking
content: Search ranking determines the order of search results.

title: Hybrid Search
content: Hybrid search combines keyword and vector search.

title: Re-ranking
content: Re-ranking improves search results using additional models.

title: Similarity Score
content: Similarity score measures closeness between vectors.

title: Dimensionality
content: Dimensionality refers to the number of features in a vector.

title: Normalization
content: Normalization scales data to a common range.

title: Batch Processing
content: Batch processing handles large datasets in chunks.

title: Streaming
content: Streaming processes data in real-time.

title: Knowledge Base
content: A knowledge base stores structured and unstructured information.

title: Context Window
content: Context window defines how much text a model can process at once.

title: Embedding Model
content: An embedding model converts text or data into numerical vectors for similarity search.

title: Vector Index
content: A vector index organizes embeddings for efficient nearest neighbor search.

title: HNSW Algorithm
content: HNSW is a graph-based algorithm used for fast approximate nearest neighbor search.

title: Approximate Nearest Neighbor
content: ANN search finds close matches quickly without checking all data points.

title: Distance Metric
content: Distance metrics determine how similarity between vectors is calculated.

title: Cosine Distance
content: Cosine distance measures dissimilarity based on angle between vectors.

title: Dot Product
content: Dot product measures similarity by multiplying corresponding vector elements.

title: Embedding Dimension
content: Embedding dimension defines the size of the vector representation.

title: Sparse Vector
content: Sparse vectors contain mostly zero values and are memory efficient.

title: Dense Vector
content: Dense vectors contain mostly non-zero values and represent embeddings.

title: Text Embedding
content: Text embeddings represent words or sentences numerically for ML models.

title: Image Embedding
content: Image embeddings convert images into vector representations.

title: Multimodal AI
content: Multimodal AI processes multiple data types such as text and images.

title: Retrieval Pipeline
content: A retrieval pipeline fetches relevant data before generating responses.

title: Document Loader
content: A document loader extracts data from files like PDFs or websites.

title: Text Splitter
content: A text splitter divides documents into smaller chunks for processing.

title: Chunk Overlap
content: Chunk overlap ensures continuity between split text segments.

title: Vector Store
content: A vector store manages embeddings and supports similarity queries.

title: Retriever
content: A retriever fetches relevant documents based on query embeddings.

title: Generator Model
content: A generator model produces final responses using retrieved context.

title: OpenAI API
content: OpenAI API provides access to models for text generation and embeddings.

title: Temperature
content: Temperature controls randomness in model outputs.

title: Top-k Sampling
content: Top-k sampling selects from top probable tokens during generation.

title: Top-p Sampling
content: Top-p sampling selects tokens based on cumulative probability.

title: Token Limit
content: Token limit defines maximum tokens a model can process.

title: Hallucination
content: Hallucination occurs when AI generates incorrect or fabricated information.

title: Grounding
content: Grounding ensures AI responses are based on real data sources.

title: Context Injection
content: Context injection adds retrieved data into prompts for better responses.

title: Vector Search Query
content: A vector search query compares embeddings to find similar results.

title: Payload
content: Payload stores additional metadata alongside vectors in databases.

title: Filtering Conditions
content: Filtering conditions restrict search results based on metadata.

title: Hybrid Retrieval
content: Hybrid retrieval combines vector search with keyword filtering.

title: Relevance Score
content: Relevance score indicates how well a result matches a query.

title: Data Pipeline
content: A data pipeline processes and moves data through stages.

title: ETL
content: ETL stands for Extract, Transform, Load in data processing.

title: Feature Engineering
content: Feature engineering creates useful inputs for machine learning models.

title: Model Deployment
content: Model deployment makes trained models available for use.

title: Monitoring
content: Monitoring tracks system and model performance.

title: Logging
content: Logging records system activity for debugging and analysis.

title: Caching
content: Caching stores frequently accessed data for faster retrieval.

title: Rate Limiting
content: Rate limiting restricts the number of requests to a system.

title: Load Balancing
content: Load balancing distributes traffic across multiple servers.

title: Fault Tolerance
content: Fault tolerance ensures systems continue operating despite failures.

title: Horizontal Scaling
content: Horizontal scaling adds more machines to handle load.

title: Vertical Scaling
content: Vertical scaling increases resources of a single machine.

title: Query Embedding
content: Query embedding converts user queries into vectors for search.

title: Document Embedding
content: Document embedding converts documents into vectors.

title: Similarity Threshold
content: Similarity threshold filters results based on score cutoff.

title: Vector Clustering
content: Vector clustering groups similar embeddings together.

title: Dimensionality Reduction
content: Dimensionality reduction reduces vector size while preserving meaning.

title: PCA
content: Principal Component Analysis reduces dimensions of data.

title: t-SNE
content: t-SNE visualizes high-dimensional data in lower dimensions.

title: UMAP
content: UMAP is used for dimensionality reduction and visualization.

title: Data Augmentation
content: Data augmentation increases dataset size with variations.

title: Regularization
content: Regularization prevents overfitting in models.

title: Dropout
content: Dropout randomly disables neurons during training to prevent overfitting.

title: Activation Function
content: Activation functions introduce non-linearity into neural networks.

title: ReLU
content: ReLU is a common activation function that outputs zero for negative values.

title: Sigmoid
content: Sigmoid maps input values to a range between 0 and 1.

title: Softmax
content: Softmax converts outputs into probability distributions.

title: Loss Function
content: Loss functions measure error between predicted and actual values.

title: Gradient Descent
content: Gradient descent optimizes model parameters by minimizing loss.

title: Backpropagation
content: Backpropagation updates neural network weights based on error.

title: Epoch
content: An epoch is one complete pass through the training dataset.

title: Batch Size
content: Batch size defines number of samples processed before updating model.

title: Learning Rate
content: Learning rate controls how much weights are updated during training.

title: Optimizer
content: Optimizers adjust model weights to minimize loss.

title: Adam Optimizer
content: Adam is an adaptive learning rate optimization algorithm.

title: SGD
content: Stochastic Gradient Descent updates weights using random samples.

title: Evaluation Metrics
content: Evaluation metrics measure model performance such as accuracy and precision.

title: Precision
content: Precision measures how many selected items are relevant.

title: Recall
content: Recall measures how many relevant items are selected.

title: F1 Score
content: F1 score is the harmonic mean of precision and recall.

title: Accuracy
content: Accuracy measures the proportion of correct predictions.

title: Confusion Matrix
content: A confusion matrix shows prediction results in classification tasks.

title: True Positive
content: True positive occurs when the model correctly predicts a positive class.

title: False Positive
content: False positive occurs when the model incorrectly predicts a positive class.

title: True Negative
content: True negative occurs when the model correctly predicts a negative class.

title: False Negative
content: False negative occurs when the model incorrectly predicts a negative class.

title: ROC Curve
content: ROC curve visualizes the performance of a classification model.

title: AUC
content: AUC measures the area under the ROC curve.

title: Cross Validation
content: Cross validation evaluates model performance using multiple data splits.

title: K-Fold
content: K-Fold divides data into K subsets for validation.

title: Bias
content: Bias is error due to incorrect assumptions in the model.

title: Variance
content: Variance measures model sensitivity to data changes.

title: Bias-Variance Tradeoff
content: Tradeoff between model simplicity and flexibility.

title: Supervised Learning
content: Supervised learning uses labeled data to train models.

title: Unsupervised Learning
content: Unsupervised learning finds patterns in unlabeled data.

title: Reinforcement Learning
content: Reinforcement learning learns via rewards and penalties.

title: Clustering
content: Clustering groups similar data points together.

title: K-Means
content: K-Means clusters data into K groups based on similarity.

title: Hierarchical Clustering
content: Hierarchical clustering builds nested clusters.

title: Classification
content: Classification assigns labels to input data.

title: Regression
content: Regression predicts continuous values.

title: Decision Tree
content: Decision trees split data into branches based on conditions.

title: Random Forest
content: Random forest combines multiple decision trees.

title: SVM
content: Support Vector Machines separate data using hyperplanes.

title: Naive Bayes
content: Naive Bayes uses probability for classification.

title: Logistic Regression
content: Logistic regression predicts binary outcomes.

title: Linear Regression
content: Linear regression models relationships between variables.

title: Feature Scaling
content: Feature scaling standardizes input data ranges.

title: Standardization
content: Standardization centers data around mean zero.

title: Min-Max Scaling
content: Min-max scaling rescales data to a fixed range.

title: Outliers
content: Outliers are data points that differ significantly.

title: Data Cleaning
content: Data cleaning removes errors and inconsistencies.

title: Data Preprocessing
content: Data preprocessing prepares raw data for modeling.

title: Missing Values
content: Missing values occur when data entries are absent.

title: Imputation
content: Imputation fills missing values using statistical methods.

title: Feature Selection
content: Feature selection chooses relevant variables for models.

title: Feature Extraction
content: Feature extraction transforms raw data into useful features.

title: Hyperparameters
content: Hyperparameters control model behavior before training.

title: Grid Search
content: Grid search finds optimal hyperparameters by testing combinations.

title: Random Search
content: Random search selects random combinations of parameters.

title: Bayesian Optimization
content: Bayesian optimization tunes hyperparameters efficiently.

title: Early Stopping
content: Early stopping halts training when performance stops improving.

title: Model Drift
content: Model drift occurs when model performance degrades over time.

title: Data Drift
content: Data drift occurs when input data distribution changes.

title: Concept Drift
content: Concept drift occurs when relationships in data change.

title: Online Learning
content: Online learning updates models continuously with new data.

title: Batch Learning
content: Batch learning trains models on entire datasets at once.

title: Knowledge Retrieval
content: Knowledge retrieval fetches relevant information from storage.

title: Context Ranking
content: Context ranking orders retrieved results by relevance.

title: Answer Generation
content: Answer generation produces responses using context and models.

title: Prompt Template
content: Prompt templates structure input for consistent outputs.

title: System Prompt
content: System prompts define behavior and role of an AI model.

title: User Prompt
content: User prompt is the input given to an AI system.

title: Few-shot Prompting
content: Few-shot prompting provides examples to guide responses.

title: Chain of Thought
content: Chain of thought prompting encourages step-by-step reasoning.

title: Tool Use
content: Tool use allows models to call external functions.

title: Function Calling
content: Function calling enables structured outputs from models.

title: JSON Output
content: JSON output structures responses in machine-readable format.

title: Streaming Response
content: Streaming sends output incrementally to users.

title: Latency Optimization
content: Latency optimization reduces response time.

title: Caching Embeddings
content: Caching embeddings avoids recomputation for repeated queries.

title: Vector Compression
content: Vector compression reduces storage size of embeddings.

title: Sharding
content: Sharding splits data across multiple nodes.

title: Replication
content: Replication copies data for reliability.

title: Consistency
content: Consistency ensures data accuracy across systems.

title: Availability
content: Availability ensures system uptime.

title: Partition Tolerance
content: Partition tolerance handles network failures.

title: CAP Theorem
content: CAP theorem states tradeoffs between consistency, availability, and partition tolerance.

title: Data Serialization
content: Serialization converts data into a storable format.

title: Deserialization
content: Deserialization reconstructs data from stored format.

title: Schema
content: Schema defines structure of stored data.

title: NoSQL Database
content: NoSQL databases store flexible, non-relational data.

title: SQL Database
content: SQL databases use structured tables and queries.

title: Graph Database
content: Graph databases store relationships between entities.

title: Time Series Database
content: Time series databases store time-based data.

title: Search Engine
content: Search engines index and retrieve information efficiently.

title: Full Text Search
content: Full text search allows searching entire documents.

title: Greeting - Hello
content: Hello! How can I assist you today?

title: Greeting - Hi
content: Hi there! What can I help you with?

title: Greeting - Hey
content: Hey! How’s it going?

title: Greeting - Good Morning
content: Good morning! Hope you have a great day ahead. How can I help?

title: Greeting - Good Afternoon
content: Good afternoon! How can I assist you today?

title: Greeting - Good Evening
content: Good evening! What can I do for you?

title: Farewell - Goodbye
content: Goodbye! Have a nice day!

title: Farewell - See You
content: See you later! Take care!

title: Farewell - Take Care
content: Take care! Feel free to come back anytime.

title: Gratitude - Thanks
content: You're welcome! Happy to help.

title: Gratitude - Thank You
content: Glad I could help! Let me know if you need anything else.

title: Small Talk - How are you
content: I'm doing great! How about you?

title: Small Talk - What's up
content: Not much, just here to help you! What's up with you?

title: Small Talk - How is your day
content: My day is going well! How’s yours?

title: Bot Identity
content: I am an AI chatbot designed to assist you with information and tasks.

title: Bot Capability
content: I can answer questions, help with learning, and assist with various tasks.

title: Help Request
content: Sure! Tell me what you need help with.

title: Clarification
content: Could you please clarify your question?

title: Fallback
content: I'm not sure I understand. Could you rephrase that?

title: Apology
content: Sorry about that! Let me try again.

title: Affirmation - Yes
content: Great! Let’s proceed.

title: Affirmation - Okay
content: Okay! What would you like next?

title: Negation - No
content: No problem! Let me know what you prefer.

title: Encouragement
content: You're doing great! Keep going.

title: Motivation
content: Stay positive and keep learning!

title: Joke Response
content: Why did the computer show up at work late? It had a hard drive!

title: Fun Response
content: I love chatting with you! 😊

title: Time Inquiry
content: I can help with time-related questions. What would you like to know?

title: Weather Inquiry
content: I can guide you on weather info, but I may need your location.

title: Good Night
content: Good night! Sleep well.

title: Welcome
content: Welcome! How can I assist you today?

title: Repeat Request
content: Sure, let me repeat that for you.

title: Slow Down Request
content: No problem, I'll go step by step.

title: Confusion Response
content: That seems a bit unclear. Could you explain more?

title: Error Handling
content: Something went wrong. Please try again.

title: User Praise
content: Nice question! Let's explore it.

title: Acknowledgement
content: Got it! Let’s continue.

title: Wait Response
content: Just a moment while I process that.

title: Thinking Response
content: Let me think about that for a second.

title: Multi-turn Support
content: Would you like more details on that?

title: Suggestion
content: You might also find this helpful.

title: Follow-up Question
content: Do you want me to explain further?

title: Polite Refusal
content: I’m sorry, I can’t assist with that request.

title: Boundary Setting
content: I can help with safe and appropriate topics.

title: Greeting Variation
content: Hi! Nice to see you here.

title: Greeting Variation 2
content: Hello again! How can I help this time?

title: User Check-in
content: Is everything clear so far?

title: Completion Check
content: Did that answer your question?

title: Encouraging Return
content: Feel free to ask anytime!

title: Session End
content: Thanks for chatting! Have a great day!

title: Casual Greeting
content: Hey there! What’s on your mind?

title: Friendly Tone
content: I’m here and ready to help!

title: Positive Feedback
content: That’s a great question!

title: Neutral Feedback
content: Alright, let’s look into that.

title: Excited Response
content: Awesome! Let’s dive in.

title: Calm Response
content: Sure, let’s go step by step.

title: Polite Prompt
content: Please let me know how I can assist you.

title: Reassurance
content: I’m here to help you anytime.

title: Curiosity Prompt
content: That sounds interesting! Tell me more.

title: Closure
content: Alright! Let me know if you need anything else.

title: Greeting Natural
content: Hey there! 😊 How can I help you today?

title: Greeting Friendly
content: Hi! It’s great to see you here. What would you like to talk about?

title: Greeting Casual
content: Hello! What’s on your mind today?

title: Morning Warm
content: Good morning! ☀️ Hope you’re starting your day on a positive note. How can I assist?

title: Evening Warm
content: Good evening! 🌙 How’s your day been so far?

title: How Are You Response
content: I’m doing well, thanks for asking! 😊 How about you?

title: Whats Up Response
content: Not much, just here and ready to help! What’s up with you?

title: Thanks Response Warm
content: You’re very welcome! 😊 I’m glad I could help.

title: Thanks Response Friendly
content: Anytime! Feel free to ask if something else comes up.

title: Apology Natural
content: Ah, sorry about that! Let me fix it for you.

title: Clarification Gentle
content: I want to make sure I understand—could you explain that a bit more?

title: Clarification Friendly
content: Hmm, can you give me a little more detail so I can help better?

title: Fallback Polite
content: I might be missing something—could you rephrase that for me?

title: Encouragement Warm
content: You’re on the right track! Keep going 👍

title: Motivation Friendly
content: Don’t worry, you’ve got this! Let’s figure it out together.

title: Joke Light
content: Why don’t programmers like nature? Too many bugs 😄

title: Fun Playful
content: I’d say I’m 99% helpful and 1% jokes 😄

title: Thinking Response
content: Good question… let me think about that for a moment.

title: Processing Response
content: Give me a second, I’m working through that.

title: Follow-up Natural
content: Would you like me to go deeper into that?

title: Follow-up Curious
content: Want me to explain it in more detail?

title: Acknowledgement Natural
content: Got it, that makes sense.

title: Acknowledgement Friendly
content: Alright, I see what you mean!

title: Suggestion Soft
content: You might find this approach helpful.

title: Suggestion Friendly
content: Here’s something you could try.

title: Reassurance Warm
content: No worries at all, I’m here to help 😊

title: Reassurance Calm
content: Take your time, we’ll figure it out step by step.

title: Polite Refusal Natural
content: I’m sorry, I can’t help with that, but I can assist with something else.

title: Boundary Friendly
content: I try to keep things helpful and safe—let me know if there’s another way I can help.

title: Excited Response
content: That’s awesome! Let’s dive into it 🚀

title: Calm Response
content: Sure, let’s go through it step by step.

title: User Praise Natural
content: That’s a really thoughtful question.

title: User Praise Friendly
content: Nice one—that’s a great point to explore!

title: Check Understanding
content: Does that make sense so far?

title: Completion Check
content: Did that answer what you were looking for?

title: Conversation Continue
content: What would you like to explore next?

title: Conversation Open
content: I’m all ears—tell me what you’re thinking.

title: Goodbye Warm
content: Alright, take care! It was nice chatting with you 😊

title: Goodbye Friendly
content: See you later! Feel free to come back anytime.

title: Session Close
content: Thanks for the chat! Have a great day ahead ✨

title: Curiosity Prompt
content: That sounds interesting—tell me more!

title: Engagement Prompt
content: I’d love to hear more about that.

title: Wait Soft
content: Just a sec, I’m putting that together.

title: Wait Friendly
content: Hang on a moment, I’m working on it.

title: Neutral Response
content: Alright, let’s take a look at that.

title: Positive Response
content: Sounds good! Let’s go ahead.

title: Casual Tone
content: Gotcha, let’s break it down.

title: Friendly Tone
content: Happy to help, let’s figure it out together.

title: Light Humor
content: I promise I’ll keep it simple 😄

title: Playful Response
content: Let’s make this fun and easy!

title: Supportive Tone
content: You’re doing great so far, keep going!

title: Guidance Tone
content: Let me guide you through this.

title: Clarify Intent
content: Just to be sure—are you asking about the concept or implementation?

title: Refocus
content: Let’s focus on the main part of your question.

title: Soft Correction
content: Almost there—let’s adjust that slightly.

title: Direct Correction
content: That’s close, but here’s the correct way to think about it.

title: Offer Help
content: I’m here if you need more help with this.

title: Offer Extra
content: I can also give examples if you’d like.

title: Closure Soft
content: Alright, that should get you started.

title: Closure Friendly
content: Let me know whenever you’re ready for the next step!
